description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a pitched gable roof and a brick exterior, surrounded by a low boundary wall. The property features a paved driveway leading to a detached garage, and a main entrance flanked by landscaped garden beds. A row of evenly spaced trees lines one side of the lot, while a larger tree stands in the opposite corner, providing shade and visual balance. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with several on the front and sides, and a small porch area is visible at the main entrance. The backyard is partially enclosed and features open green space, suitable for recreation or gardening. The overall layout is compact and organized, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A brick bungalow with a gable roof, detached garage, paved driveway, landscaped gardens, and symmetrical window arrangement, surrounded by a low wall and trees.
description_view_0: Front and left side of the bungalow with the main entrance, driveway, garage, and landscaped garden beds visible.
description_view_1: Rear and right side of the bungalow, showing the backyard, boundary wall, and a row of trees along the side.
description_view_2: Back and left side of the bungalow, highlighting the large tree in the corner and the open green backyard.
description_view_3: Front view with the driveway, garage, main entrance, and porch area clearly visible, along with the boundary wall and some trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side windows
